ramulator2_device.scope: DRAM device timing only (refresh + bank conflicts); refresh=AllBank

analytic_system.scope: system-level, calibrated to the silicon decode wall (24.2 GB/s LPDDR4x)

finding: Ramulator2 (device-only) single-stream efficiency 0.92 >> analytic system efficiency 0.65 — NOT a contradiction: the gap is the system overhead (controller/NoC/queueing/real-workload) that the analytic 0.65 captures (silicon-calibrated) and Ramulator2's device model omits. Confirms the DRAM device is not the single-stream bottleneck, and validates ADR-0002 (system efficiency calibrated from silicon, NOT imported from Ramulator2).
honesty: simulated (Ramulator2 v2.1 device model), NOT silicon; single-stream only. The analytic system-level 33.3 stays PRIMARY. Ramulator2's signature value (multi-unit contention) is Phase 2.
